claim_boundary.next_gate: If the no-loss gate passes, preregister a verifier-level holdout that binds the selected compiler artifact before any soundness experiment.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: Verifier acceptance, causal hardware performance, readout mitigation, current calibration, provider access, hardware execution, protocol soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or new B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Design-separated validation of a compiler-in-the-loop deterministic dense-interaction fallback against automatic-layout exposure baselines.

requirements.label: four new dense source families are materialized
candidate and validation seed blocks are disjoint
temporal and seeded-layout candidate sources are both represented
portfolio selection never reads validation baseline outcomes
all 12 groups have complete candidate and validation ledgers
all 12 selected QASM files replay in a fresh process
automatic-baseline no-loss verdict is evaluated without promotion
verifier acceptance, mitigation, calibration, and hardware remain excluded
no soundness, advantage, BQP, or new credit is claimed
